title: 剃须刀 —— 诱饵(1901 至今)

description.en: Sell the razor handle cheap, give it away in promotional bundles, or include it with army rations. Patented to accept only Gillette blades. Low or negative margin per unit — but every razor sold creates a long-term blade customer.
description.zh: 剃须刀手柄低价出售,或者作为促销赠品 / 军队配给一起送出。专利锁定,只能配合吉列刀片使用。单台手柄低利甚至亏本 —— 但每卖出一把就锁定一个长期刀片客户。
